_readme: Manual FACEIT-FACT overrides — NOT comps. Use this to fill facts the public FACEIT API doesn't expose: replay codes, hero bans, pick/veto. Rename to match_facts.json and commit; apply_match_facts.py writes them with source='manual_facts', which never creates hero comps. Comps go in corrections/corrections.json instead. Build entries with fact-admin.html.

maps.notes: Entered from FACEIT room after match.
